title: Tracing, Evals, and Failure Analysis · State Clinic: Trajectory Evals
summary: Evaluate a multi-turn tool agent across realistic environments. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops trajectory evals increment in an agent trace and evaluation suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Evaluate action trajectories and state outcomes as well as final text.
Record decisions, tool calls, results, state changes, timing, and identifiers without exposing private reasoning.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
